name: Array Item Schema Change
description: Backend changed the schema of items within an array without updating OpenAPI spec

backend.implementation: res.json({ cartId: 'CART-999', items: [{ id: 'ITEM-123', qty: 2, unitPrice: 49.99, subtotal: 99.98 }] })

frontend.usage: items.map(item => item.itemId) // undefined for all items

fields.userImpact: Cart items cannot be identified. Product details, images, and links fail to load. Cart appears empty or broken.
Item quantities not displayed. Users cannot see how many of each item they're purchasing.
Individual item prices not shown. Total calculation may fail.
